---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're running into.

## Proposed solution

What would you like to happen? Be as specific as you can about the API or behavior.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or examples from similar libraries that handle this well.
